shell_injection.description: Command pipes downloaded content directly to shell

stealth_download.description: Downloads file and makes it executable

obfuscation.description: Uses obfuscation techniques (base64 decode or eval)

tmp_execution.description: Creates and executes files in /tmp directory

remote_exec.description: Executes remote script without saving locally

suspicious_download.description: Silent download from remote URL (may hide activity)

hidden_file.description: Writes to hidden file (starts with dot)
